visual_description: In a dimly lit, green-hued room, an older man with white hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a white shirt, stands between two other men. He looks down at a small object in his hand, then looks up and speaks to the man on his right, who is wearing a dark shirt. The man on the right takes the object from him and looks at it.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, followed by a short, sharp electronic beep.
